allies.rationale_text: Boundaries helps authenticity turn candor into usable commitments instead of performative oversharing.
allies.source_quote: asking directly, Here is what I want from you. What do you want from me?

allies.rationale_text: Signaling helps authenticity explain why congruence under pressure is more credible than polished declarations about character.
allies.source_quote: the most legitimate and convincing way to convey commitment and credibility to a team, superseding direct declarations of values or traits

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines authenticity when people defend a preferred self-story instead of facing uncomfortable truth.
Rationalization fights authenticity when the press-secretary part of the mind spins choices after the fact instead of naming what is actually true.
antagonists.source_quote: processing information to reach a desired conclusion

structured_tensions.tension_text: Authenticity conflicts with authority-bias when personal conviction is mistaken for evidential weight because the speaker is perceived as genuine.
structured_tensions.source_quote: authenticity conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when personal conviction is mistaken for evidential weight because the speaker is perceived as genuine.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Authenticity conflicts with confirmation-bias when commitment to one's authentic position becomes selective attention to supporting evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: authenticity conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when commitment to one's authentic position becomes selective attention to supporting evidence.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on grounded credibility, boundary-setting candor, and anti-self-deception pressure, but it does not give a clean explicit current-vocabulary tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor personal-brand relation sprawl beyond the cleaner congruence, signaling, and anti-self-story surface.
open_questions: The rationalization antagonist is source-grounded but more interpretive than the boundaries and signaling allies, so it should stay read conservatively.
